subject: [RFC PATCH v4 24/27] cxl/core: Add cxl_sysram region type

reviews.author: Gregory Price
reviews.summary: The reviewer is still evaluating the patch series and has not provided any feedback or comments.

2026-02-22.patch_summary: This patch series introduces a new CXL sysram region type, which eliminates the intermediate dax_region/dax device layer by directly performing memory hotplug operations. The sysram region supports memory tier integration for proper NUMA placement and uses Kconfig options to configure default online types.
